string.name: module_desc
string.value: AudioDock - Your personal music & audiobook hub

string.name: location_cap_invalid
string.value: This device does not have the system capability of location service

string.name: location_cap_valid
string.value: This device has the system capability of location service

string.name: permission_internet_reason
string.value: AudioDock needs internet access to stream music and sync your library.

string.name: permission_storage_reason
string.value: AudioDock needs storage access to save downloaded music and cache.

string.name: permission_media_control_reason
string.value: AudioDock needs media control to manage playback and show notifications.

string.name: permission_network_info_reason
string.value: AudioDock needs network info to switch between WiFi and mobile data.

string.name: permission_nfc_reason
string.value: AudioDock uses NFC to scan music sources quickly.
